content:
## Goal

## Cargo Workspace Structure

```
repos/dorea/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Cargo.toml              # workspace manifest
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Cargo.lock
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ README.md               # updated for v2
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ crates/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ dorea-cli/          # binary: dorea grade/calibrate/preview
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Cargo.toml
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ src/
в”‚   в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ main.rs
в”‚   в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ calibrate.rs
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ dorea-color/        # pure color math (no external deps)
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Cargo.toml
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ src/
в”‚   в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ lib.rs
в”‚   в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ dlog_m.rs   # D-Log M в†” linear
в”‚   в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ lab.rs      # RGB в†” CIELAB (D65)
в”‚   в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ hsv.rs      # RGB в†” HSV
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ dorea-lut/          # depth-stratified LUT build + apply
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Cargo.toml
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ src/
в”‚   в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ lib.rs
в”‚   в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ types.rs    # LutGrid, DepthLuts
в”‚   в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ build.rs    # build_depth_luts (importance weighting, NN fill)
в”‚   в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ apply.rs    # apply_depth_luts (trilinear + depth blending)
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ dorea-hsl/          # HSL 6-vector qualifier correction
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Cargo.toml
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ src/
в”‚   в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ lib.rs
в”‚   в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ qualifiers.rs
в”‚   в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ derive.rs   # derive_hsl_corrections
в”‚   в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ apply.rs    # apply_hsl_corrections
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ dorea-cal/          # calibration file format
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Cargo.toml
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ src/
в”‚   в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ lib.rs
в”‚   в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ format.rs   # Calibration struct, save/load (bincode)
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ dorea-video/        # stub (Phase 2: ffmpeg subprocess)
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Cargo.toml
в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ src/
в”‚           в””в”Ђв”Ђ lib.rs
в””в”Ђв”Ђ python/                 # stub (Phase 2: VDA + RAUNE-Net subprocess)
    в””в”Ђв”Ђ dorea_inference/
        в””в”Ђв”Ђ __init__.py
```

---
